title: Success Stories: A Chinese Power Systems Research Engineer Secures EB2-NIW Approval in Just Over One Month via the Premium Processing
content:
Client’s Testimonial:
“Thank you very much for your help! Really excited that my case got approved without RFE. Thank you so much!”
On June 9 th , 2025, we received another EB-2 NIW ( National Interest Waiver ) approval for a Power System Research Engineer in the Field of Power Systems ( Approval Notice ).
General Field: Power Systems
Position at the Time of Case Filing : Power System Research Engineer
Country of Origin: China
State of Residence at the Time of Filing: Washington
Approval Notice Date: June 9 th , 2025
Processing Time: 1 month and 7 days (Premium Processing Requested)
NAILG ( North America Immigration Law Group ) recently secured approval for an I-140 EB-2 NIW ( National Interest Waiver ) petition for a distinguished Power System Research Engineer from China. Our client specializes in developing advanced data-driven methodologies and optimization frameworks designed to enhance power grid stability, reliability, and resilience.
Significant Contributions to Power Systems Engineering
Our client's research directly addresses critical challenges in modern power systems. Her groundbreaking work involves creating sophisticated data-driven models and optimization techniques that support reliable electricity supplies, minimize outage risks, and significantly improve grid stability, particularly under extreme weather conditions. Her innovative methodologies help to strengthen grid resilience, optimize renewable energy integration, and enhance fault detection and grid restoration capabilities.
Key Accomplishments and Impact
In preparing her petition, we highlighted several remarkable research achievements and academic contributions:
● An exceptional publication record of 2 first-authored peer-reviewed journal articles and 6 peer-reviewed conference papers, 4 of which she first-authored, in respected journals.
● Groundbreaking research that also resulted in 1 accepted conference paper, 3 first-authored conference abstracts, 1 first-authored preprint, and 2 technical reports.
● Her scholarly works accumulated 93 citations, demonstrating significant international recognition and impact.
● Two of her publications have notably ranked among the top 10% most-cited papers in engineering for their respective publication years, underscoring her substantial and influential contributions.
● Conducted at least 5 peer reviews for respected journals and conferences, confirming her recognized expertise within her professional community.
● Received research funding from prominent organizations, including the National Science Foundation (NSF) and the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) .
The petition was supported by two strong recommendation letters, including an independent advisory opinion from a recognized expert in the field. These letters provided compelling confirmation of the substantial merit and national importance of her research contributions. One expert stated:
“To conclude, [client] has focused her research on power system fault detection, deep learning-based grid monitoring, and real-time wildfire risk mitigation using advanced CNNs. Moreover, she has made impressive contributions to developing high-accuracy machine learning models for fault localization, publishing her work in leading peer-reviewed journals and conferences. Her distinctive array of skills sets her apart from her peers, firmly solidifying [client’s] standing at the forefront of the power system field.”
NAILG emphasized the national significance of our client's research, particularly its implications for strengthening and modernizing U.S. energy infrastructure. Her developments directly contribute to reducing widespread power outages, efficiently integrating renewable energy sources, and safeguarding the grid against extreme climate events, thus aligning with key national priorities.
Swift Petition Approval with the Premium Processing
Thanks to our strategic petition preparation and meticulous documentation, USCIS approved her I-140 EB2- NIW petition swiftly. Filed with the premium processing, her case was approved swiftly in just 1 month and 7 days without a Request for Evidence (RFE).
We congratulate our client on her impressive achievements and are proud to have supported her successful journey. NAILG looks forward to seeing her continued contributions to building robust and sustainable power systems in the United States.
--------------------------------------------
North America Immigration Law Group (Chen Immigration Law Associates) is a U.S. immigration law firm dedicated to representing corporations, research institutions, and individuals from all 50 U.S. states regarding I-140 immigration petitions. We specialize in employment-based immigration petition and have a proven record of high success rate for the categories of: EB2- NIW ( National Interest Waiver ), EB1-A ( Alien of Extraordinary Ability ), EB1-B (Outstanding Researcher/Professor) and O-1 ( Alien of Extraordinary Ability ).
Our Sixty-four Thousand I-140 Approvals Provide Unprecedented Insight into the USCIS Adjudication Trend
With nearly 64,000 EB-1A , EB-1B , EB-2 NIW and O-1 cases approved, we have first hand information on the manner in which the USCIS adjudicate I-140 cases. As the USCIS has constantly changed its adjudication standards for the EB-1A , EB-1B and EB-2 NIW categories, our firm's huge database of successful cases gives you unprecedented insight to USCIS adjudication trends. We carefully analyze the data for all of our cases and apply the results of our analyses toward giving our clients up-to-date advice and adapting our strategies such that we remain on par with the ever-shifting landscape of immigration law in the U.S. With us, you will always have access to important updates, strategies, and information so that you can make the most informed decisions about your case.
We Have Helped Tens of Thousands of Clients with Credentials and Backgrounds Similar to Yours
With our exceedingly large number of successful petitions, no matter what credentials you have, no matter your background and field of expertise, no matter your visa status or nationality, chances are we have helped hundreds or even thousands of clients just like you. Our clients are usually impressed with how well we understand their research and work. Our insight and understanding stems from the fact that we have handled many cases with elements similar to yours already, and this helps us devise the best strategies for each individual petition.
Vast Majority of Clients Came to Us Because of Referrals
For years, our firm has attracted new clients based solely on word of mouth, recommendations, and the positive collaboration experiences shared with them by their friends and family. We take pride in our reputation and work hard to ensure that we provide a green card application experience that our clients are happy to share with their friends and colleagues. That is how our cumulative total of approved cases grew from 600 in 2013 to nearly 64,000 in 2025.
Track Record of Success EB-1 and NIW Approvals
